Home / Services / Sewer Line Repair & Replacement

Sewer Line Repair & Replacement

Expert sewer line services in San Jose, including repair, replacement, and cleaning.

Sewer line problems can be messy and disruptive. Owens Family Plumbers offers comprehensive sewer line services to keep your sewer system functioning properly. We can handle any sewer line issue, from minor clogs to major breaks.

We use a variety of methods to repair or replace sewer lines, including traditional trenching and trenchless methods. Trenchless methods, such as pipe bursting and pipe lining, can minimize disruption to your property and save you time and money. Our experienced technicians will assess your situation and recommend the best solution for your needs.

With the aging infrastructure in some San Jose neighborhoods, sewer line issues are not uncommon. Don't let a sewer line problem ruin your day. Call Owens Family Plumbers for prompt, reliable sewer line service in San Jose.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Inspect the sewer line and diagnose the problem.
  2. 02 Step 2: Provide a detailed estimate for repair or replacement.
  3. 03 Step 3: Perform the necessary repairs or replace the sewer line.
  4. 04 Step 4: Test the sewer line to ensure it's functioning properly.

Benefits

  • Proper sewer line function
  • Prevention of sewage backups
  • Protection of your property
  • Peace of mind

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the signs of a sewer line problem?

Signs of a sewer line problem include sewage backups, slow drains, gurgling noises in your pipes, and a foul odor in your yard.

What is trenchless sewer line repair?

Trenchless sewer line repair is a method of repairing or replacing sewer lines without digging up your yard. This can save time, money, and disruption to your property.

How much does sewer line repair cost?

The cost of sewer line repair varies depending on the extent of the damage and the method used. We offer free estimates for our sewer line services.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with sewer line repair & replacement? Contact us today.
